pages.title: overview
pages.content:
NTIRE Workshop and Challenges @ CVPR 2026

 

The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images

Important dates

  • 2026.01.15 Release of train data (input and output)
  • 2026.01.15 Release of validation data (inputs only)
  • 2026.01.30 Validation server online
  • 2026.03.13 Final test data release (inputs only)
  • 2026.03.17 Test output results submission deadline
  • 2026.03.17 Fact sheets and code/executable submission deadline
  • 2026.03.19 Preliminary test results release to the participants
  • 2026.03.24 Paper submission deadline for entries from the challenge
  • 2026.06.x NTIRE workshop and challenges, results and award ceremony (CVPR 2026, USA)

 

Challenge overview

The 11th edition of NTIRE: New Trends in Image Restoration and Enhancement workshop will be held on June 17th, 2026 in conjunction with CVPR 2026.

Image manipulation is a key computer vision tasks, aiming at the restoration of degraded image content, the filling in of missing information, or the needed transformation and/or manipulation to achieve a desired target (with respect to perceptual quality, contents, or performance of apps working on such images). Recent years have witnessed an increased interest from the vision and graphics communities in these fundamental topics of research. Not only has there been a constantly growing flow of related papers, but also substantial progress has been achieved.

Each step forward eases the use of images by people or computers for the fulfillment of further tasks, as image manipulation serves as an important front end. Not surprisingly then, there is an ever-growing range of applications in fields such as surveillance, the automotive industry, electronics, remote sensing, or medical image analysis etc. The emergence and ubiquitous use of mobile and wearable devices offer another fertile ground for additional applications and faster methods.

This workshop aims to provide an overview of the new trends and advances in those areas. Moreover, it will offer an opportunity for academic and industrial attendees to interact and explore collaborations.

 

Motivation for this competition

Raindrops on camera lenses or windshields significantly reduce image visibility in human life, posing challenges for applications like surveillance and autonomous driving. Effective raindrop removal is crucial to ensuring reliable performance in these systems. However, most deraining datasets overlooked the complex environment in real life. In particular, there are few raindrop-focused datasets, and most existing datasets focus on capturing background scenes while the camera is focused on the background. Meanwhile, these datasets primarily target daytime scenarios, with limited attention to nighttime conditions.

To promote the development of deraining, we introduce the first large-scale real-world raindrop-clarity dataset, which includes raindrop-focused images and nighttime scenes. Based on this dataset, we have the first NTIRE Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images, jointly with the NTIRE workshop.

The goal of this competition is to establish a new and applicable benchmark for the Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images. We are looking forward to the collaborative efforts of our participants, aiming to elevate the quality of training images. The final ranking will be made based on PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS.

 

The top-ranked participants will be awarded and invited to follow the CVPR submission guide for workshops to describe their solution and to submit to the associated NTIRE workshop at CVPR 2026.

More details are found in the competition data section.

Competition

The training data has already been made available to the registered participants.

Provided Resources

  • Scripts: With the dataset the organizers will provide scripts to facilitate the reproducibility of the images and performance evaluation results after the validation server is online. More information is provided on the data page.
  • Contact: You can use the forum on the data description page (highly recommended!) or directly contact the challenge organizers by email (xin.li@ustc.edu.cn, jinyeying@u.nus.edu, jinxin@eitech.edu.cn, zongwei.wu@uni-wuerzburg.de, lbc31415926@mail.ustc.edu.cn and Radu.Timofte@uni-wuerzburg.de) if you have doubts or any questions.
pages.content_zh:
NTIRE研讨会和挑战赛 @ CVPR 2026

 

第二届双焦点图像日夜雨滴去除挑战赛

重要日期

  • 2026.01.15 发布训练数据（输入和输出）
  • 2026.01.15 发布验证数据（仅输入）
  • 2026.01.30 验证服务器上线
  • 2026.03.13 发布最终测试数据（仅输入）
  • 2026.03.17 测试输出结果提交截止日期
  • 2026.03.17 事实表和代码/可执行文件提交截止日期
  • 2026.03.19 向参赛者发布初步测试结果
  • 2026.03.24 来自挑战赛的论文提交截止日期
  • 2026.06.x NTIRE研讨会和挑战赛、结果和颁奖典礼（CVPR 2026，美国）

 

挑战赛概述

第11届NTIRE：图像复原与增强新趋势研讨会将于2026年6月17日与CVPR 2026联合举办。

图像处理是计算机视觉的关键任务，旨在恢复退化的图像内容、填补缺失信息或进行必要的变换和/或操作以实现所需的目标（涉及感知质量、内容或在此类图像上工作的应用程序性能）。近年来，视觉和图形社区对这些基础研究课题的兴趣不断增加。相关论文的发表数量持续增长，并取得了实质性进展。

每一步进展都为人们或计算机使用图像完成进一步任务提供了便利，因为图像处理是一个重要的前端。不足为奇的是，在监控、汽车工业、电子学、遥感或医学图像分析等领域存在着越来越多的应用。移动设备和可穿戴设备的出现和广泛使用为额外应用和更快方法提供了另一片沃土。

本研讨会旨在提供这些领域新趋势和进展的概览。此外，它将为学术界和工业界的与会者提供互动和探索合作的机会。

 

竞赛的动机

附着在摄像机镜头或挡风玻璃上的雨滴会显著降低人类生活中的图像可见性，对监控和自动驾驶等应用构成挑战。有效的雨滴去除对于确保这些系统的可靠性能至关重要。然而，大多数去雨数据集忽略了现实生活中的复杂环境。特别是，很少有针对雨滴的数据集，大多数现有数据集集中于捕捉背景场景，而摄像机对背景进行聚焦。同时，这些数据集主要针对白天场景，对夜间条件的关注有限。

为了促进去雨技术的发展，我们引入了首个大规模真实世界雨滴清晰度数据集，其中包括以雨滴为焦点的图像和夜间场景。基于该数据集，我们与NTIRE研讨会联合举办首届NTIRE双焦点图像日夜雨滴去除挑战赛。

本竞赛的目标是为双焦点图像日夜雨滴去除建立新的和实用的基准。我们期待参赛者的共同努力，旨在提高训练图像的质量。最终排名将基于PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS进行。

pages.title: data
pages.content:
NTIRE Workshop and Challenges @ CVPR 2026

 

The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images

 

Data overview

The dataset named RainDrop Clarity is contributed by Yeying Jin et al (NUS). The dataset includes both daytime and nighttime scenes for training and testing. (i) The daytime raindrop dataset contains a total of 5,442 paired or triplet images, with 4,713 pairs used for training and the remaining 729 pairs for testing. (ii) The nighttime raindrop dataset consists of 9,744 paired or triplet images, where 8,655 pairs are allocated to the training set, and the remaining 1,089 pairs are reserved for the validation and test set.

In this competition, the used dataset is composed of:

  • train data: A total of 14,139 day and night dual-focused raindrop images with blurry backgrounds and their corresponding clear backgrounds are provided.
  • validation data: A total of 240 day and night rainy images are provided. 
  • test data: A total of 731 day and night rainy images are provided.

 

Data access

By accessing the data the participants implicitly agree with the terms and conditions of the challenge.

 

    • Development phase / Learning:
      • Train Data, please download day rainy data and night rainy data with Google drive.
      • Validation Data (only input images), has been released
      • Test Data (only input images), has be released with Google drive "We have released the test input with google drive "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1E82JAS7bSt73pXA5cWoaoWyan0WKaZyp/view?usp=sharing" The" !!!

 

Final test phase submission guidelines (Factsheet can be downloaded from here)

The final submission should be emailed to xin.li@mail.ustc.edu.cn; yshustc@mail.ustc.edu.cn; jinyeying@u.nus.edu; Radu.Timofte@uni-wuerzburg.de

The title of the mail should be:  [COMPETITION_NAME] - [TEAM_NAME]

The body of the mail shall include the following:

      1. the challenge full name
      2. team name
      3. team leader and all members' names, email addresses and institutes.
      4. team members with NTIRE2026 sponsors
      5. team name and user names on NTIRE2026 Codabench competitions
      6. executable/source code attached or download links
      7. factsheet attached (you should use the updated factsheet of the competition!)
      8. download link(s) to the FULL results of ALL of the test frames (corresponding to the last entry in the online Codalab test server and provided codes/exe)

The executable/source code should include trained models or necessary parameters so that we could run it and reproduce results. There should be a README or descriptions that explains how to execute the executable/code. Factsheet must be a compiled pdf file and a zip with the corresponding .tex source files. Please provide a detailed explanation.

Note that you can still submit to the validation server in those competitions for which the validation ground truth images were not released. 

 

Final test phase - preliminary results [TBA]

Here are the preliminary results: <>

Note that changes are likely to happen, we are still checking the submissions with their results. If your entry is not correctly reported please contact asap the challenge organizers. Depending on the submitted factsheets/reproducibility and results many participants will be invited next week to co-author and edit the challenge report.

Note that all the participants with interesting or top ranked solutions are invited to contribute a paper to the NTIRE 2026 workshop. However, the paper will be double-blind peer reviewed for contributions (a top ranking solution is in itself a contribution) and scientific quality as any other CVPR or NTIRE paper. Submission deadline for challenge papers follows the NTIRE2026. Check NTIRE 2026 website for more info.
pages.content_zh:
NTIRE 2026研讨会和挑战赛 @ CVPR 2026

 

第二届日夜雨滴去除双焦点图像挑战赛

 

数据概览

数据集名称为RainDrop Clarity，由新加坡国立大学(NUS)的Yeying Jin等人贡献。该数据集包含训练和测试的日间和夜间场景。(i)日间雨滴数据集包含总共5,442对或三元组图像，其中4,713对用于训练，剩余729对用于测试。(ii)夜间雨滴数据集包含9,744对或三元组图像，其中8,655对分配给训练集，剩余1,089对保留用于验证和测试集。

在本次竞赛中，使用的数据集由以下部分组成：

  • 训练数据：总共14,139张日夜双焦点雨滴图像及其对应的清晰背景。
  • 验证数据：总共240张日夜雨天图像。
  • 测试数据：总共731张日夜雨天图像。

 

数据获取

通过访问数据，参赛者隐式同意挑战赛的条款和条件。

 

    • 开发阶段/学习阶段：
      • 训练数据，请通过Google Drive下载日间雨天数据和夜间雨天数据。
      • 验证数据（仅输入图像）已发布。
      • 测试数据（仅输入图像）已通过Google Drive发布"我们已发布测试输入https://drive.google.com/file/d/1E82JAS7bSt73pXA5cWoaoWyan0WKaZyp/view?usp=sharing""！

 

最终测试阶段提交指南（事实说明书可从这里下载）

最终提交应发送电子邮件至xin.li@mail.ustc.edu.cn; yshustc@mail.ustc.edu.cn; jinyeying@u.nus.edu; Radu.Timofte@uni-wuerzburg.de

邮件主题应为：[竞赛名称] - [队伍名称]

邮件正文应包含以下内容：

      1. 挑战赛全名
      2. 队伍名称
      3. 队长和所有成员的姓名、电子邮箱地址和所属机构
      4. NTIRE2026赞助商的队伍成员
      5. NTIRE2026 Codabench竞赛平台上的队伍名称和用户名
      6. 可执行文件/源代码附件或下载链接
      7. 附加事实说明书（应使用竞赛的最新事实说明书！）
      8. 所有测试帧的完整结果的下载链接（对应在线Codalab测试服务器上的最后一条记录和提供的代码/可执行文件）

可执行文件/源代码应包含训练模型或必要参数，以便我们能够运行并重现结果。应包含README或说明文档，解释如何执行可执行文件/代码。事实说明书必须是编译的PDF文件和包含相应.tex源文件的zip文件。请提供详细说明。

请注意，对于未发布验证真实标签图像的竞赛，您仍然可以提交到验证服务器。

 

最终测试阶段 - 初步结果 [待公布]

以下是初步结果：<>

请注意可能会发生变化，我们仍在检查提交结果

pages.title: evaluation
pages.content:
NTIRE Workshop and Challenges @ CVPR 2026

 

The Second Challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images

 

Evaluation

The evaluation consists of the comparison of the restored images with the reference ground truth images. Please inference all images with the same model (do not distinguish day and night).

The evaluation consists of the comparison of PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS.

For the final results, we will compute it by weighting the above metric as the initial results: final_score = PSNR (Y) + 10*SSIM (Y) - 5*LPIPS.

For submitting the results, you need to follow these steps:

  1. process the input images and keep the same name for the output image results as produced by your method (example: for an input file with the name "00063.png" the output file should be "00063.png") Note that the output images should have the size of the input images.  The submission example can be found in "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LTGEuGxU0bXOv--pLcj0VJj-S2JoM2PK/view?usp=sharing". 
  2. create a ZIP archive containing the files and a readme.txt  Note that the archive should not include folders, all the files should be in the root of the archive.
  3. the readme.txt file should contain the following lines filled in with the runtime per image (in seconds) of the solution, 1 or 0 accordingly if employs CPU or GPU at runtime, and 1 or 0 if employs extra data for training the models or not.
    runtime per image [s] : 10.43 
    CPU[1] / GPU[0] : 1
    Extra Data [1] / No Extra Data [0] : 1
    Other description: Solution based on A+ of Timofte et al. ACCV 2014. We have a Matlab/C++ implementation, and report single core CPU runtime. The method was trained on Train 91 of Yang et al. and BSDS 200 of the Berkeley segmentation dataset. 
      The last part of the file can have any description you want about the code producing the provided results (dependencies, link, scripts, etc.)
    The provided information is very important both during the validation period when different teams can compare their results / solutions but also for establishing the final ranking of the teams and their methods.
pages.content_zh:
NTIRE 研讨会和挑战赛 @ CVPR 2026

 

第二届日夜雨滴去除双焦点图像挑战赛

 

评估

评估包括将恢复的图像与参考真值图像进行比较。请使用同一模型对所有图像进行推理（不区分日间和夜间）。

评估包括PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS的比较。

对于最终结果，我们将通过对上述指标进行加权来计算，作为初始结果：final_score = PSNR (Y) + 10*SSIM (Y) - 5*LPIPS。

提交结果时，需要按照以下步骤操作：

  1. 处理输入图像，并为方法生成的输出图像结果保持与输入相同的名称（示例：输入文件名为"00063.png"时，输出文件应为"00063.png"）。注意输出图像的尺寸应与输入图像相同。提交示例可在"https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LTGEuGxU0bXOv--pLcj0VJj-S2JoM2PK/view?usp=sharing"中找到。
  2. 创建包含文件和readme.txt的ZIP压缩包。注意压缩包不应包含文件夹，所有文件应位于压缩包的根目录中。
  3. readme.txt文件应包含以下行，并填入解决方案的每张图像运行时间（以秒为单位），根据运行时是否使用CPU或GPU分别填1或0，以及是否使用额外数据进行模型训练分别填1或0。
    runtime per image [s] : 10.43 
    CPU[1] / GPU[0] : 1
    Extra Data [1] / No Extra Data [0] : 1
    Other description: Solution based on A+ of Timofte et al. ACCV 2014. We have a Matlab/C++ implementation, and report single core CPU runtime. The method was trained on Train 91 of Yang et al. and BSDS 200 of the Berkeley segmentation dataset. 
      文件的最后部分可包含您想要的任何关于生成所提供结果的代码描述（依赖项、链接、脚本等）。
    所提供的信息非常重要，既可用于验证期间不同团队比较其结果/解决方案，也可用于确定团队及其方法的最终排名。

pages.title: organizers
pages.content:
NTIRE Workshop and Challenges @ CVPR 2026

 

Organizers

 

The NTIRE challenge on Day and Night Raindrop Removal for Dual-Focused Images is organized jointly with the University of Science and Technology of China (USTC), National University of Singapore (NUS), Ningbo Institute of Digital Twin, Eastern Institute of Technology (EIT), and the NTIRE 2026 workshop.  The results of the challenge will be published at the NTIRE 2026 workshop and in the CVPR 2026 Workshop proceedings.

More information about the NTIRE workshop and challenge organizers is available here: https://cvlai.net/ntire/2026/
pages.content_zh:
NTIRE 研讨会和挑战赛 @ CVPR 2026

 

组织者

 

NTIRE 日夜雨滴移除双焦点图像挑战赛由中国科学技术大学 (USTC)、新加坡国立大学 (NUS)、宁波数字孪生研究院、东方工业技术学院 (EIT) 和 NTIRE 2026 研讨会联合组织。该挑战赛的结果将在 NTIRE 2026 研讨会和 CVPR 2026 研讨会论文集中发表。

有关 NTIRE 研讨会和挑战赛组织者的更多信息，请访问：https://cvlai.net/ntire/2026/
